info.name: NABERS API Techncial Documentation
info.description:
# NABERS API Technical Documentation

## Introduction to the NABERS API Ecosystem

The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) API ecosystem provides a comprehensive suite of tools for calculating, targeting, and retrieving building performance ratings. This collection documents the three main APIs available in the NABERS platform:

### 1\. Forward Rating Calculator API

The Forward Rating Calculator API allows users to calculate NABERS ratings for various building types based on actual energy or water consumption data. This API is ideal for building owners, facility managers, and sustainability professionals who want to assess their building's current performance according to the NABERS methodology.

**Key Features:**

- Calculate energy, water and indoor environment ratings
    
- Support for multiple building types (offices, hotels, shopping centers, data centers, etc.)
    
- Detailed performance metrics including greenhouse gas emissions, energy intensity, and benchmarking factors
    
- Integration with Renewable Energy Indicator (REI) calculations
    

### 2\. Reverse Rating Calculator API

The Reverse Rating Calculator API enables users to determine the maximum energy or water consumption targets required to achieve a specific NABERS star rating. This is particularly useful for setting performance goals during building design, retrofits, or when establishing sustainability targets.

**Key Features:**

- Set target star ratings and calculate required consumption limits
    
- Support for the same building types as the Forward Calculator
    
- Detailed breakdown of energy sources (electricity, gas, diesel) or water consumption targets
    
- Emissions calculations for different scopes (1, 2, and 3)
    

### 3\. Rating Register API

The Rating Register API provides access to all publicly available NABERS ratings in the database. This API allows users to query and retrieve certified ratings for different building types, making it valuable for market research, benchmarking, and compliance verification.

**Key Features:**

- Filter ratings by building type, rating type, and certification status
    
- Pagination support for handling large datasets
    
- Search for specific buildings using premise IDs
    
- Access to historical rating data
    

## Using the APIs Together

These three APIs can be used together to create powerful applications for building performance management:

1. Use the **Rating Register API** to understand market benchmarks and identify high-performing buildings in specific sectors or locations
    
2. Apply the **Forward Rating Calculator API** to assess your building's current performance
    
3. Utilize the **Reverse Rating Calculator API** to set performance targets and determine the consumption reductions needed to achieve desired ratings
    

All APIs require authentication via an API key passed in the `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key` header.

---

item.name: Rating Register API

request.description:
## Overview This request retrieves certified energy ratings for office buildings with pagination support. ## Request Method and URL - **Method:** GET - **URL:** [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingregisterapi](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingregisterapi) ## Headers | Key | Value | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `{{vault:API_KEY}}` | API subscription key (required) | ## Query Parameters Below are some parameters that can be used in Rating Register API to retrieve data from NABERS database for ratings. | Parameter | Description | Possible Values | Required/Optional | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | buildingType | Type of building for which ratings are requested | "Office", "Shopping Centre", "Hotel", "Data Centre", "Apartment Building", etc. | Required | | ratingType | Type of rating to retrieve | "Energy", "Water", "Indoor Environment", etc. | Required | | status | Status of the ratings to retrieve | "Expired", "Certified - current" | Optional | | pageNumber | Page number for pagination | Integer (1, 2, 3, etc.) | Optional | | pageSize | Number of results per page | Integer (e.g., 8, 10, 50, 200) | Optional | | premiseID | Filter results by specific premise ID | Valid premise ID | Optional | | fromDate | Start date for filtering ratings (YYYY-MM-DD) | Any valid date | Optional | ## Response Below are description of fields returned in the rating Register API: | Field | Description | | --- | --- | | PremiseID | Unique building ID within platform rating was certified
(i.e. Members/Perform) | | PremisesName | Name of building as stated by rating customer | | AltPremisesName | Alternative name for the premise | | Customer | Company or organization who initiated the rating request (usually Building Owner or Facilities Manager) | | TenancyUnitShopOrLevel | For Tenancy ratings only (Offices or Retail Stores) | | BuildingType | Building sector (Office, Hotel, Apartment, Shopping Centre etc.) | | StreetNumber | Street Number of Premise Address | | StreetName | Street Name of Premise Address | | Suburb | Suburb of Premise Address | | State | State of Premise Address | | Postcode | Postcode of Premise Address | | Latitude & Longitude | Coordinates of premise’s location | | RatingReferenceNumber | Unique ID for that rating record | | RatingType | Type of rating - Energy, Water, Indoor Environment, Carbon Neutral or Waste | | RatingScope | The scope of the rating dependant of Building or Premise Type (e.g. Offices = Base Building, Whole Building or Tenancy) | | CertificateValidTo | Date certificate is valid until | | EnergyGPStarRatingValueNoGP | NABERS Energy Star Rating w/o Greenpower (0-6) | | SectorComparisonDial | For Building Performance Indicator Ratings | | RatingProgressMetric
ForEnergyWithoutGreenPower | Decimal Star Rating indicator | | EnergyGreenPowerPercent | % of Green Power included in Rating | | EnergyGreenPower | Yes/No GreenPower used in Rating | | WasteStarRatingValue | NABERS Waste Star Rating (0-6) | | IEQStarRatingValue | NABERS Indoor Environment Star Rating (0-6) | | GHGEmissionsScope123
withRenewableElectricity | Total emissions Scopes 1, 2, 3 - kgCO2 (Calculated using Market Based emissions) | | GHGEmissionsScope123
withoutRenewableElectricity | Total emissions Scopes 1, 2, 3 – kgCO2 (Calculated

WithoutRecycledWater | Decimal Star Rating indicator for Water (w RW) | | RatingProgressMetricForWater
WithRecycledWater | Decimal Star Rating indicator Water (w/o RW) | | WaterRecycledPercent | % of Recycled Water included in Rating | | WaterRecycled | Total recycled water included in Rating in kL | | WaterConsumption | Total water consumption in rating in kL (non-recycled only) | | WaterConsumptionWoRW | Total water consumption in rating in kL (non-recycled + recycled) | | WaterIntensity | Water Intensity in kL | | ThermalComfortScore | IE Ratings - Score based on space temperature,

For NABERS purposes, these sources are wind and solar (kWh) | | NonRenewableElectricity_kWh | Electricity consumption from non-renewable source (kWh) | | NonRenewableElectricity_REI% | Electricity consumption from non-renewable source REI% | | OnsitePVCapacity_kW | If entered in rating onsite renewable energy generation capacity for building displayed here (kW) | | OnsiteRenewableElectricity_kWh | Renewable electricity generated by system installed on the rated premises in kWh | | OnsiteRenewableElectricity_REI% | Renewable electricity generated by system installed on the rated premises (%) | | RETandStateTerritoryTargets_kWh | Renewable Energy Target and State Territory Targets in kWh | | RETandStateTerritorytargets_REI% | Renewable Energy Target and State Territory Targets (%) | | GreenPower_kWh | Accredited Greenpower purchases in kWh | | GreenPower_REI% | Accredited Greenpower purchases % | | OtherVoluntaryPurchases_kWh | Non-Greenpower accredited LGC’s retired in kWh | | OtherVoluntaryPurchases_REI% | Non-Greenpower accredited LGC’s retired % | ## Notes - The API requires a valid subscription key - Use pagination parameters to control the volume of data returned - This request is configured to retrieve certified energy ratings for office buildings - The response includes certified ratings based on the specific parameters provided - Error messages will be returned if required parameters are missing or invalid - Please note the API field name and value for buildingType input vary from the those used in Rating Calculator and Reverse calculator API. Please check documentation in the main page of this folder on exact input name to use ## References This documentation is based on the NABERS Rating Register API specifications.

item.description:
The Rating Register API is meant to provide a more automated way to allow users to read the data for public ratings without having to rely on manual updates. Using API would allow customer to programatically read the data directly into their own built applications. The Rating Register API is an API that customer can call to retrieve all public ratings available in Perform based on specific parameters that will would be included in each call. The Rating Register API pulls data directly from the NABERS Perform and returns the records in a structure that is indicative of how the ratings are stored. The Rating Register API uses a pagination approach when retrieving records due to large size of ratings in NABERS Perform. You can specify the PageSize and PageNumber to make multiple calls if you need to split the number of records returned over more than one call The Rating Register API also allows customers to filter Rating based on different parameters. Curruently these are the filters NABERS are offering: - **Building Type.** You can specify which building sector you want to retrieve data for. - **Rating Status**. You can retrieve expired ratings that valid from as early as July 1st 2021. If you need data that goes beyond July 1st 2021 please get in touch with the NABERS team - **Premise ID.** You can retrieve all current rating based on the Premise ID To understand the best way to make these adjustments to your API call please reference the examples provided below in the documentation. Futhermore, customers using the Rating Register API will notice the following: - Each rating type is returned as a separate record. If a building has both an energy and water rating, then two separate records are returned. - The fields returned in the API does not filter out the fields returned based on the rating type. Hence, water rating related fields such as WaterStarRatingValue, WaterRecycledPercent and WaterRecycled will return null values for an energy rating type. Similarly, energy related fields such as GreenPower_REI_Percent, GHGEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity and EnergyGPStarRatingValueNoGP will return null values for a water rating. - If a building has mutliple scope ratings per a building such a co-assess rating with whole building and tenancy scopes then there will be separate ratings for each individual scope for that building. | **Building type** | **Rating Type** | | --- | --- | | Office | Energy
Water
Indoor Environment | | Shopping centre | Energy
Water | | Hotel | Energy
Water | | DataCentre | Energy | | Apartment Building | Energy
Water | | Residential Aged Care
Retirement Living | Energy
Water | | Warehouse and cold store | Energy | | School | Energy
Water | | Retail store | Energy | | Energy Performance Indicator ** (For the values to send to rating Register please see the individual values in the table "Energy Performance Indicator Building type below) | Energy | ## API Call Limits Currently there are both daily and minute limits than can be made to the Rating Register API per subscription. These are indicated in the table below. | **Type of Limit** | **Amount** | | --- | --- | | Daily limit | 1000 calls per day | | Calls per minute | 200 calls per minute | ## Real-time Data The API calls read directly from NABERS Perform so the data is real-time. ## Energy Performance Indicator When using the Rating Register API to call Energy Performance Indicator ratings you will need use the values from the table below: | **Building Type** | | --- | | Agricultural and aquacultural buildings | | Aquatic centres | | Cemeteries and crematoriums | | Childcare centre | | Correctional facilities | | Emergency services and police stations | | Sports centres | | Other entertainment and recreation centres | | Bakeries and confectionaries | | Other food retailing service | | Restaurants and cafes | | Pubs and clubs | | Other food and beverage | | Yoga/pilates studios | | Other gymnasiums | | Laboratories | | Caravan park | | Other lodging and accommodation | | Bakery product factory (manufacture only) | | Other manufacturing facilities | | Outdoor and environmental education centres | | Libraries | | Galleries and museums | | Courts | | Religious buildings | | Community centres | | Other public buildings | | Petrol stations | | Automotive repair garage | | Car dealerships | | Dry-cleaners and laundromats | | Storage facilities | | Airports (terminals and aerodromes) | | Train stations | | Other passenger transport | | Transport - other transport buildings | ## Potential Errors Below is a list of some errors you might receive when calling the Rating Register API | **Error Code** | **Error Message** | **Possible reasons** | | --- | --- | --- | | 401 | Access denied due to invalid subscription key. Make sure to provide a valid key for an active subscription. | Please check that a valid API subscription key is entered in the header of the request. | | 404 | Resource not found | Please check the URL syntax for errors | | N/A | buildingType is required. | buildingType value was not included in the request | | N/A | ratingType is required | ratingType value was not included in the request | The sample requests in this folder are meant to guide our customers on how to structure their API calls. If you are still facing issue using the Rating Register API then please reach out to NABERS team.

request.description:
# Office Base Building Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for office base buildings based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of office buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `****` (masked) | API subscription key (required) |
| Authorization | Bearer | Bearer token for authentication (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing a few sections:

1. Control: Inputs about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. ratingInputs: consist of the following:
    
    - attributes: building attributes such as _weeklyOperatingHours, ratedSiteArea, totalComputerCount_
        
    - RenewableEnergy Indicator inputs such as totalOREGConsumption, totalOnsiteLGCsExported
        
    - Energy inputs, water or Indoor environment inputs depending on the Rating Type used for thr rating.
        

### Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Postal code of the building location |
| PremiseType | String | Type of premise (must be "Office" for this endpoint) |
| RatingScope | String | Scope of the rating (Base, Whole, Tenancy) |
| RatingType | String | Type of rating (Energy, Water, IE, Waste) |
| SiteName | String | Name of the building/site |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email for notifications |
| CompanyName | String | Name of the company requesting the rating |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the building |
| ratingPeriodFrom | String | This optional field can be used if you want to calculate the rating based on a previous year emission data |

### RatingInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TotalArea | Number | Total net lettable area in square meters | 400 |
| TotalHours | Number | Total operational hours per week | 50 |
| TotalComputerCount | Number | Number of computers in the building | 267 |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total onsite renewable electricity generation consumption | 54212.97 |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net onsite renewable electricity generation consumption | 54212.97 |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total onsite Large-scale Generation Certificates exported | 10 |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total offsite energy purchases | 10000 |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in MJ | 1274457.25 |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in MJ | 719565.14 |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ | 2996857.54 |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ | 450.55 |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption | 55027.92 |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately | 3000 |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Offsite Large-scale Generation Certificates surrendered | 333.123 |
| EnergyInputs | Object | Breakdown of energy inputs by type | See below |

#### EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Electricity consumption in kWh | 31922.8 |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower consumption percentage | 30 |
| Gas | Number | Gas consumption in MJ | 5000 |
| Diesel | Number | Diesel consumption in L | 30 |

## Expected Response

The response is a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

``` json
[
    {
        "waterResults": null,
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": {
            "totalRenewableElectricity": 179420.51,
            "totalPredictedEmissions": null,
            "totalEnergyUse": 121080.08,
            "totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 360883.74,
            "totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 408688.44,
            "starRatingGranular": null,
            "starRatingDecimal": null,
            "starRating": null,
            "sectorComparisonDial": null,
            "rETAndStateTerritoryTargetsREIPercent": 7.3,
            "rETAndStateTerritoryTargets": 105207.54,
            "rEIResultPercentDecimal": 12.4,
            "rEIResultPercent": 12,
            "referenceData": null,
            "predictedMedianITEnergy": null,
            "predictedMedianInfrastructure": null,
            "predictedGreenhouseGasIntensity": null,
            "performanceIndicatorResult": null,
            "otherVoluntaryPurchasesREIPercent": 23.8,
            "otherVoluntaryPurchases": 343123.0,
            "onsiteRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 3.8,
            "onsiteRenewableElectricity": 54212.97,
            "nonRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 29.8,
            "nonRenewableElectricity": 429684.57,
            "noGreenPowerStarRatingGranular": 5.0,
            "noGreenPowerStarRatingDecimal": 5.043957833956087,
            "noGreenPowerStarRating": 5.0,
            "noGreenPowerPredictedGHGIntensity": null,
            "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope123": 64.1087175,
            "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope12": 59.106464,
            "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope123": 25643.487,
            "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope12": 23642.585600000002,
            "noGreenPowerBenchmarkingFactor": 68.06806580874792,
            "greenPowerREIPercent": 4.0,
            "greenpowerPercentage": null,
            "greenPower": 58027.92,
            "greenHousGasEmissionLPG": null,
            "greenHousGasEmissionGas": null,
            "greenHousGasEmissionElectricity": null,
            "greenHousGasEmissionDiesel": null,
            "greenHousGasEmissionCoal": null,
            "greenHouseGasIntensityScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 902.21,
            "greenHouseGasIntensityScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 1021.72,
            "greenhouseGasIntensityScope123": 57.80396450000001,
            "greenhouseGasIntensityScope12": 53.280553,
            "greenhouseGasEmissionsScope123": 23121.585800000004,
            "greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12": 21312.2212,
            "gasAndLPGREIPercent": 57.7,
            "energyIntensity": 302.0,
            "emissionFactorElectricity": 0.73,
            "dieselREIPercent": 0.0,
            "calculatedPUE": null,
            "benchmarkingFactor": 61.392759117298105,
            "actualEmissionsWoGP": null,
            "actualEmissions": null
        }
    }
]

 ```

### Response Fields

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| StarRating | The calculated NABERS star rating (0-6 scale) |
| RatedArea | The area used in the rating calculation |
| RatedHours | The hours used in the rating calculation |
| NormalizedEnergyMJ | Normalized energy consumption in megajoules |
| EnergyIntensity | Energy intensity metric |
| Benchmark | Benchmark value for comparison |
| RatingScore | Numerical rating score |
| Messages | Array of information or error messages |

## Notes

- The API requires a valid subscription key
    
- The response includes both the star rating and detailed calculation metrics
    
- Error messages will be returned if required parameters are missing or invalid
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Energy Rating Calculator API specifications.

[https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs](https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs)

# Office Base Building Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS water ratings for office base buildings based on provided building characteristics and water consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Water rating assesses the water efficiency of office buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `{{vault:API_KEY}}` | API subscription key (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope, etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as weeklyOperatingHours, ratedSiteArea, totalComputerCount
        
    2. Water inputs used for thr rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Postal code of the building location |
| PremiseType | String | Type of premise (must be "Office" for this endpoint) |
| RatingScope | String | Scope of the rating (Base, Whole, Tenancy) |
| RatingType | String | Type of rating (must be "Water" for this endpoint) |
| SiteName | String | Name of the building/site |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email for notifications |
| CompanyName | String | Name of the company requesting the rating |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the building |
| ratingPeriodFrom | String | This optional field can be used if you want to calculate the rating based on a previous year emission data |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TotalArea | Number | Net lettable area of the building in square meters | 4000 |
| TotalHours | Number | Weekly operating hours of the building | 50 |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) for the rating period | 2168 |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water consumption in kiloliters (kL) for the rating period | 6504.9 |

## Expected Response

``` json
[
    {
        "waterResults": {
            "waterStarRatingGranular": 6.9,
            "waterStarRatingDecimal": 13.340530971424062,
            "waterStarRating": 6.0,
            "waterConsumptionPerUnitArea": null,
            "waterConsumption": 6504.9,
            "recycledWaterPercent": 300.04151291512915,
            "predictedAverageWaterUse": -1.0763979504310348,
            "normalisedWaterConsumption": -1.084225,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 4.4,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": 4.411555096423236,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRating": 4.0,
            "noRecycleWaterConsumption": 2168.0,
            "noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse": 0.5531400252050566,
            "noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption": 0.542,
            "noRecycleBenchmarkingFactor": null,
            "benchmarkingFactor": null
        },
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": null
    }
]

 ```

## Response Fields

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RatingResults | Object | Container for rating calculation results |
| RatingScore | Number | The NABERS star rating (0-6 scale with 0.5 increments) |
| WaterIndex | Number | Normalized water efficiency index |
| WaterConsumption | Object | Container for water consumption metrics |
| TotalWaterConsumption | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| WaterConsumptionPerArea | Number | Water consumption per square meter (kL/m²) |
| BenchmarkWaterConsumptionPerArea | Number | Benchmark water consumption per square meter for this building type (kL/m²) |
| Messages | Array | List of informational or error messages |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

request.description:
# NABERS Office Base Building Indoor Environment Rating Calculator

## Overview

This endpoint calculates NABERS Indoor Environment (IE) ratings for office base buildings. The NABERS IE rating assesses the quality of the indoor environment provided by the building owner to tenants, measuring factors such as thermal comfort, air quality, acoustic comfort, and lighting quality.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |
| Content-Type | application/json | Specifies the request body format |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Indoor environment inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Postal code of the building location |
| PremiseType | String | Type of premise (must be "Office" for this endpoint) |
| RatingScope | String | Scope of the rating (Base, Whole, Tenancy) |
| RatingType | String | Type of rating (Energy, Water, IE, Waste) |
| SiteName | String | Name of the building/site |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email for notifications |
| CompanyName | String | Name of the company requesting the rating |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the building |
| ratingPeriodFrom | String | This optional field can be used if you want to calculate the rating based on a previous year emission data |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 IEInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ThermalComfortAnnualMonitoring | Number | Percentage of time the building maintains thermal comfort conditions over the year | 94 |
| ThermalComfortSpotMeasurements | Number | Spot measurement results for thermal comfort | 94 |
| IndoorAirQualityParticulateMatter | Number | Particulate matter concentration (PM2.5) in μg/m³ | 5.5 |
| IndoorAirQualityVentilationEffectivness | Number | Ventilation effectiveness percentage | 93 |
| IndoorAirQualityCarbonMonoxide | Number | Carbon monoxide concentration in ppm | 0.4 |
| IndoorAirQualityTotalVOCs | Number | Total volatile organic compounds in mg/m³ | 0.8 |
| IndoorAirQualityFormaldehyde | Number | Formaldehyde concentration in ppm | 0.04 |
| LightingHorizontalIlluminance | Number | Horizontal illuminance in lux | 65 |
| AcousticMeasurementTenancyWholeBenchmark | Number | Acoustic measurement for tenancy/whole building in dB | 35 |
| AcousticMeasurementBaseBenchmark | Number | Acoustic measurement for base building in dB | 40.2 |
| OccupantSurveyThermalComfort | Number | Occupant satisfaction with thermal comfort (0-100%) | 50 |
| OccupantSurveyIndoorAirQuality | Number | Occupant satisfaction with indoor air quality (0-100%) | 50 |
| OccupantSurveyLighting | Number | Occupant satisfaction with lighting (0-100%) | 50 |
| OccupantSurveyAcoustics | Number | Occupant satisfaction with acoustics (0-100%) | 50 |
| OccupantSurveyOfficeLayout | Number | Occupant satisfaction with office layout (0-100%) | 50 |

## Expected Response

The response is a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

``` json
[
    {
        "waterResults": null,
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": {
            "ventilationEffectivenessScore": 67.71332033960013,
            "totalVolatileOrganicCompoundsScore": null,
            "thermalComfortWeightedScore": 25.0,
            "thermalComfortOverallScore": 62.58802943742302,
            "thermalComfortOccupantSurveyScore": null,
            "spotMeasurementsScore": 62.128274845491035,
            "particulateMatterScore": 60.80737966059277,
            "officeLayoutWeightedScore": 0.0,
            "officeLayoutScore": 50.0,
            "lightingScoreWeightedScore": 0.0,
            "lightingScore": 48.62962870042895,
            "lightingOccupantSurveyScore": 50.0,
            "indoorStarRating": 3.0,
            "indoorAirQualityScore": 65.09215473757168,
            "indoorAirQualityOccupantSurveyScore": null,
            "iEOverallScore": 61.0,
            "horizontalIlluminanceScore": 47.259257400857905,
            "formaldehydeScore": null,
            "carbonMonoxideScore": 64.0507643507585,
            "annualMonitoringScore": 62.894532498711,
            "airQualityWeightedScore": 26.0,
            "acousticsScore": 49.66408382849461,
            "acousticsOccupantSurveyScore": null,
            "acousticMeasurementScore": 49.66408382849461,
            "acousticComfortWeightedScore": 9.9
        },
        "energyResults": null
    }
]

 ```

### Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| sequence | Number | Sequence number of the calculation |
| requestId | String/null | Identifier for the request (if provided) |
| lstExceptions | Array/null | List of exceptions encountered during calculation |
| ieResults | Object | Indoor Environment rating results |
| energyResults | Object/null | Energy rating results (null for IE rating requests) |

#### **ieResults Object**

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| indoorStarRating | Number | The final NABERS star rating (0-6 stars) |
| iEOverallScore | Number | Overall Indoor Environment score (0-100) |
| thermalComfortWeightedScore | Number | Weighted score for thermal comfort category |
| thermalComfortOverallScore | Number | Overall thermal comfort score |
| thermalComfortOccupantSurveyScore | Number/null | Score from occupant survey for thermal comfort |
| annualMonitoringScore | Number | Score from annual monitoring of thermal conditions |
| spotMeasurementsScore | Number | Score from spot measurements of thermal conditions |
| airQualityWeightedScore | Number | Weighted score for air quality category |
| indoorAirQualityScore | Number | Overall indoor air quality score |
| indoorAirQualityOccupantSurveyScore | Number/null | Score from occupant survey for air quality |
| ventilationEffectivenessScore | Number | Score for ventilation effectiveness |
| particulateMatterScore | Number | Score for particulate matter levels |
| carbonMonoxideScore | Number | Score for carbon monoxide levels |
| totalVolatileOrganicCompoundsScore | Number/null | Score for total volatile organic compounds |
| formaldehydeScore | Number/null | Score for formaldehyde levels |
| lightingScoreWeightedScore | Number | Weighted score for lighting category |
| lightingScore | Number | Overall lighting quality score |
| formaldehydeScore | Number/null | Score for formaldehyde levels |
| lightingScoreWeightedScore | Number | Weighted score for lighting category |
| lightingScore | Number | Overall lighting quality score |
| lightingOccupantSurveyScore | Number | Score from occupant survey for lighting |
| horizontalIlluminanceScore | Number | Score for horizontal illuminance measurements |
| acousticComfortWeightedScore | Number | Weighted score for acoustic comfort category |
| acousticsScore | Number | Overall acoustics score |
| acousticsOccupantSurveyScore | Number/null | Score from occupant survey for acoustics |
| acousticMeasurementScore | Number | Score from acoustic measurements |
| officeLayoutWeightedScore | Number | Weighted score for office layout category |
| officeLayoutScore | Number | Score for office layout from occupant survey |
|  |  |  |

## Notes

- The star rating is calculated based on the overall IE score, with higher scores resulting in higher star ratings.
    
- Some scores may be null if the corresponding measurements were not provided in the request.
    
- The weighted scores represent the contribution of each category to the overall IE score.
    
- Scores are typically on a scale of 0-100, with higher scores indicating better performance.
    

## References

This documentation is based on NABERS Energy Calculator API specifications.

request.description:
# Office Whole Building Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for office whole buildings based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of office buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `****` (masked) | API subscription key (required) |
| Authorization | Bearer | Bearer token for authentication (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as weeklyOperatingHours, ratedSiteArea, totalComputerCount
        
    2. RenewableEnergy Indicator inputs such as totalOREGConsumption, totalOnsiteLGCsExported
        
    3. Energy inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The postal code where the building is located |
| PremiseType | String | The type of premise (must be "Office") |
| RatingScope | String | The scope of the rating (must be "Whole" for whole building) |
| RatingType | String | The type of rating (must be "Energy") |
| SiteName | String | The name of the building or site |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | Name of the company or organization |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the building |
| ratingPeriodFrom | String | This optional field can be used if you want to calculate the rating based on a previous year emission data |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TotalArea | Number | Total net lettable area in square meters | 400 |
| TotalHours | Number | Total operational hours per week | 50 |
| TotalComputerCount | Number | Number of computers in the building | 267 |

#### 2.2 Renewable Energy Indicator

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption in kWh |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net on-site renewable electricity generation consumption in kWh |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total on-site Large-scale Generation Certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total off-site energy purchases in kWh |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in kWh |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in kWh |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in kWh |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Off-site Large-scale Generation Certificates surrendered |

#### 2.3 EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Electricity consumption in kWh |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower consumption percentage |
| Gas | Number | Gas consumption in MJ |
| Diesel | Number | Diesel consumption in L |

### Expected Response

The response is a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

``` json
[
    {
        "waterResults": null,
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": {
            "totalRenewableElectricity": 95178.31,
            "totalPredictedEmissions": null,
            "totalEnergyUse": 1118183.5999999999,
            "totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 416619.62,
            "totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 473237.1,
            "starRatingGranular": null,
            "starRatingDecimal": null,
            "starRating": null,
            "sectorComparisonDial": null,
            "rETAndStateTerritoryTargetsREIPercent": 1.5,
            "rETAndStateTerritoryTargets": 20965.34,
            "rEIResultPercentDecimal": 6.6,
            "rEIResultPercent": 7,
            "referenceData": null,

            "otherVoluntaryPurchases": 343123.0,

            "greenPower": 58027.92,

            "greenHousGasEmissionGas": null,
            "greenHousGasEmissionElectricity": null,
            "greenHousGasEmissionDiesel": null,
            "greenHousGasEmissionCoal": null,

            "benchmarkingFactor": 12.367893461004293,
            "actualEmissionsWoGP": null,
            "actualEmissions": null
        }

 ```

## Response Fields

The API returns a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| starRating | Number | The calculated NABERS star rating (0-6 stars) |
| ratingScore | Number | The numerical score of the rating |
| carbonEmissions | Number | Total carbon emissions in kg CO₂-e |
| carbonEmissionsIntensity | Number | Carbon emissions intensity in kg CO₂-e/m² |
| energyConsumption | Object | Breakdown of energy consumption by source |
| benchmarkData | Object | Reference data used for benchmarking |
| calculationDetails | Object | Detailed calculation steps and intermediate values |

## **Notes**

• The API requires a valid subscription key  
• The response includes both the star rating and detailed calculation metrics  
• Error messages will be returned if required parameters are missing or invalid

## **References**

This documentation is based on the NABERS INdoor Environemnt Rating Calculator API specifications.

# Office Whole Building Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS water ratings for office whole buildings based on provided building characteristics and water consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Water rating assesses the water efficiency of office buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `{{vault:API_KEY}}` | API subscription key (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope, etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as weeklyOperatingHours, ratedSiteArea, totalComputerCount
        
    2. Water inputs used for thr rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The postal code where the building is located |
| PremiseType | String | The type of premise (must be "Office") |
| RatingScope | String | The scope of the rating (must be "Whole" for whole building) |
| RatingType | String | The type of rating (must be "Water") |
| SiteName | String | The name of the building or site |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | Name of the company or organization |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the building |
| ratingPeriodFrom | String | This optional field can be used if you want to calculate the rating based on a previous year emission data |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| TotalArea | Number | Net lettable area of the building in square meters |
| TotalHours | Number | Weekly occupancy hours of the building |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) for the rating period | 2168 |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water consumption in kiloliters (kL) for the rating period | 6504.9 |

## Expected Response

The response is a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

``` json
[
    {
        "waterResults": {
            "waterStarRatingGranular": 4.7,
            "waterStarRatingDecimal": 4.735199793390456,
            "waterStarRating": 4.5,
            "waterConsumptionPerUnitArea": null,
            "waterConsumption": 43.2,
            "recycledWaterPercent": 20.0,
            "predictedAverageWaterUse": 0.44138551134227555,
            "normalisedWaterConsumption": 0.43200000000000005,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 4.4,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": 4.417439545459003,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRating": 4.0,
            "noRecycleWaterConsumption": 216.0,
            "noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse": 0.5511081249530063,
            "noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption": 0.54,
            "noRecycleBenchmarkingFactor": null,
            "benchmarkingFactor": null
        },
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": null
    }
]

 ```

## Response Fields

The API returns a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS water rating and related information:

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Rating | Number | The calculated NABERS star rating (0-6 scale) |
| RatingType | String | The type of rating (Water) |
| PremiseType | String | The type of premise (Office) |
| RatingScope | String | The scope of the rating (Whole) |
| NormalizedWaterConsumption | Number | Water consumption normalized by building area (L/m²) |
| Benchmark | Object | Benchmark data used for the rating calculation |
| Benchmark.RatingValue | Number | The benchmark value for the calculated rating |
| Benchmark.NextRatingValue | Number | The benchmark value required to achieve the next star rating |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

# Office Tenancy Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for office tenancies based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of office tenancies on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `****` (masked) | API subscription key (required) |
| Authorization | Bearer | Bearer token for authentication (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as weeklyOperatingHours, ratedSiteArea, totalComputerCount
        
    2. RenewableEnergy Indicator inputs such as totalOREGConsumption, totalOnsiteLGCsExported
        
    3. Energy inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |

| PremiseType | String | The type of premise (must be "Office") |
| RatingScope | String | The scope of the rating (must be "Tenancy" for tenancy assessment) |
| RatingType | String | The type of rating (must be "Energy") |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| TotalHours | Number | Total operational hours per week | 50 |

#### 2.2 Renewable Energy Indicator

# Shopping Centre Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for shopping centre buildings based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of office buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `****` (masked) | API subscription key (required) |
| Authorization | Bearer | Bearer token for authentication (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as FloorConfiguration, TotalShoppingGLAR, CentralServicedArea, etc
        
    2. RenewableEnergy Indicator inputs such as totalOREGConsumption, totalOnsiteLGCsExported
        
    3. Energy inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The postcode of the premises location |
| PremiseType | String | Must be set to "ShoppingCentre" for this rating type |
| RatingScope | String | The scope of the rating (leave empty for Shopping Centre) |
| RatingType | String | Must be set to "Energy" for energy ratings |
| SiteName | String | The name of the shopping centre |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | The company name |
| BuildingAddress | String | The full address of the shopping centre |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| FloorConfiguration | String | The floor configuration of the shopping centre (e.g., "multi storey") |
| TotalShoppingGLAR | Number | Total Gross Lettable Area Retail (GLAR) in square meters |
| CentralServicedArea | Number | Area that is centrally serviced in square meters |
| CentrallyServicedGymArea | Number | Area of centrally serviced gym in square meters |
| IsSmallShoppingCentre | Boolean | Whether the shopping centre is classified as small |
| TradingDays | Number | Number of trading days per year |
| HoursofService | Number | Weekly hours of operation |
| ParkingSpacesMechanical | Number | Number of mechanically ventilated parking spaces |
| ParkingSpacesNatural | Number | Number of naturally ventilated parking spaces |
| FoodCourtSeats | Number | Number of food court seats |

#### 2.2 Renewable Energy Indicator

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net on-site renewable electricity generation consumption |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total on-site Large-scale Generation Certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total off-site energy purchases |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in MJ |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in MJ |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Off-site Large-scale Generation Certificates surrendered |

#### 2.3 EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Total electricity consumption in MJ |
| GreenPower | Number | Total GreenPower percentage |
| Gas | Number | Total gas consumption in MJ |
| Diesel | Number | Total diesel consumption in L |

``` json
]

 ```

## Response Fields

The API returns a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| starRating | Number | The calculated NABERS star rating (0-6 stars) |
| starRatingDecimal | Number | The precise decimal value of the star rating |
| starRatingGranular | Number | Granular star rating value |
| energyIntensity | Number | Energy intensity in MJ/m² |
| totalEnergyUse | Number | Total energy consumption in MJ |
| benchmarkingFactor | Number | Factor used for benchmarking calculations |
| greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12 | Number | Greenhouse gas emissions for Scope 1 and 2 in kg CO₂-e |
| greenhouseGasEmissionsScope123 | Number | Greenhouse gas emissions for Scope 1, 2, and 3 in kg CO₂-e |
| greenhouseGasIntensityScope12 | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity for Scope 1 and 2 in kg CO₂-e/m² |
| greenhouseGasIntensityScope123 | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity for Scope 1, 2, and 3 in kg CO₂-e/m² |
| nonRenewableElectricity | Number | Non-renewable electricity consumption in kWh |
| nonRenewableElectricityREIPercent | Number | Percentage of non-renewable electricity in total energy |
| onsiteRenewableElectricity | Number | On-site renewable electricity generation in kWh |
| onsiteRenewableElectricityREIPercent | Number | Percentage of on-site renewable electricity in total energy |
| greenPower | Number | GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| greenPowerREIPercent | Number | Percentage of GreenPower in total energy |
| gasAndLPGREIPercent | Number | Percentage of gas and LPG in total energy |
| dieselREIPercent | Number | Percentage of diesel in total energy |
| rEIResultPercent | Number | Renewable Energy Index result percentage |
| rEIResultPercentDecimal | Number | Precise decimal value of REI result percentage |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Energy Rating Calculator API specifications.

# Shopping Centre Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS water ratings for shopping centre buildings based on provided building characteristics and water consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Water rating assesses the water efficiency of shopping centres on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `****` (masked) | API subscription key (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as FloorConfiguration, TotalShoppingGLAR, CentralServicedArea
        
    2. Water inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The postcode of the premises location |
| PremiseType | String | Must be set to "ShoppingCentre" for this rating type |
| RatingScope | String | The scope of the rating (leave empty for Shopping Centre) |
| RatingType | String | Must be set to "Water" for water ratings |
| SiteName | String | The name of the shopping centre |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | The company name |
| BuildingAddress | String | The full address of the shopping centre |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| TotalShoppingGLAR | Number | Total Gross Lettable Area Retail (GLAR) in square meters |
| IsSmallShoppingCentre | Boolean | Whether the shopping centre is classified as small |
| TradingDays | Number | Number of trading days per year |
| HoursofService | Number | Weekly hours of operation |
| FoodCourtSeats | Number | Number of seats in the food court |
| CinemaTheatres | Number | Number of cinema theatres in the shopping centre |
| TotalGymGLAR | Number | Total Gross Lettable Area Retail (GLAR) for gym spaces in square meters |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |

## Response

The API returns a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS water rating and related information:

### Response Structure

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| StarRating | String | The star rating representation (e.g., "5 Stars") |
| BenchmarkData | Object | Contains benchmark information for the rating |
| WaterIndex | Number | The water usage index calculated for the building |
| NormalizedWaterConsumption | Number | Water consumption normalized by building characteristics |
| RatingInputs | Object | Echo of the inputs provided in the request |
| Messages | Array | Any messages, warnings, or errors related to the calculation |

### Example Response

``` json
[
    {
        "waterResults": {
            "waterStarRatingGranular": 5.0,
            "waterStarRatingDecimal": 5.061359990738465,
            "waterStarRating": 5.0,
            "waterConsumptionPerUnitArea": null,
            "waterConsumption": 15178.0,
            "recycledWaterPercent": 30.0,
            "predictedAverageWaterUse": 1.57,
            "normalisedWaterConsumption": 0.81,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 4.2,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": 4.230514272483521,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRating": 4.0,
            "noRecycleWaterConsumption": 21683.0,
            "noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse": 1.57,
            "noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption": 1.16,
            "noRecycleBenchmarkingFactor": 73.39,
            "benchmarkingFactor": 51.37
        },
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": null
    }
]

 ```

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- Ensure all building characteristics are accurate as they directly impact the rating calculation
    
- The NABERS Water rating scale ranges from 0 to 6 stars, with 6 being the highest performance
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

# Hotel Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for hotel buildings based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of hotel buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as AAAStarRating, TotalGuestRooms, GuestRoomsLaunderService, etc
        
    2. RenewableEnergy Indicator inputs such as totalOREGConsumption, totalOnsiteLGCsExported
        
    3. Energy inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The postcode of the premises location |
| PremiseType | String | Must be set to "Hotel" for this rating type |
| RatingScope | String | The scope of the rating (leave empty for Hotel) |
| RatingType | String | Must be set to "Energy" for energy ratings |
| SiteName | String | The name of the hotel |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | The company name |
| BuildingAddress | String | The full address of the hotel |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| AAAStarRating | String | The hotel's AAA star rating (e.g., "3") |
| TotalGuestRooms | Number | Total number of guest rooms in the hotel |
| GuestRoomsLaunderService | Number | Number of guest rooms with laundry service |
| FunctionRoomSeats | Number | Total number of function room seats |
| HeatedPoolsSurfaceArea | Number | Surface area of heated pools in square meters |

#### 2.2 Renewable Energy Indicator

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net on-site renewable electricity generation consumption |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total on-site Large-scale Generation Certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total off-site energy purchases |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in kWh |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in kWh |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in kWh |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Off-site Large-scale Generation Certificates surrendered |
| EnergyInputs | Object | Breakdown of energy consumption by source |

#### 2.3 EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Electricity consumption in kWh |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower percentage |
| Gas | Number | Gas consumption in MJ |
| Diesel | Number | Diesel consumption in L |

#### WaterInputs Object (if applicable)

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RecycledWater | Number | Recycled water usage in kL |

## Expected Response

The response is a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

# Hotel Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS water ratings for hotel buildings based on provided building characteristics and water consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Water rating assesses the water efficiency of hotel buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `{{vault:API_KEY}}` | API subscription key (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as AAAStarRating, TotalGuestRooms, GuestRoomsLaunderService, etc
        
    2. RenewableEnergy Indicator inputs such as totalOREGConsumption, totalOnsiteLGCsExported
        
    3. Energy inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The postcode of the premises location |
| PremiseType | String | Must be set to "Hotel" for this rating type |
| RatingScope | String | The scope of the rating (leave empty for Hotel) |
| RatingType | String | Must be set to "Water" for water ratings |
| SiteName | String | The name of the hotel |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | The company name |
| BuildingAddress | String | The full address of the hotel |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| AAAStarRating | String | The hotel's AAA star rating (e.g., "3") |
| TotalGuestRooms | Number | Total number of guest rooms in the hotel |
| GuestRoomsLaunderService | Number | Number of guest rooms with laundry service |
| FunctionRoomSeats | Number | Total number of function room seats |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |

## Response Structure

The API returns a JSON array containing a single object with the following structure:

``` json
[
  {
    "waterResults": {
      "waterStarRatingGranular": 5.9,
      "waterStarRatingDecimal": 5.922520195599162,
      "waterStarRating": 5.5,
      "waterConsumption": 5103.0,
      "recycledWaterPercent": 1.2538699690402477,
      "predictedAverageWaterUse": 420.98,
      "normalisedWaterConsumption": 85.05,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 5.9,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": 5.908838321613198,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRating": 5.5,
      "noRecycleWaterConsumption": 5168.0,
      "noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse": 420.98,
      "noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption": 86.13
    },
    "sequence": 1,
    "requestId": null,
    "lstExceptions": null,
    "ieResults": null,
    "energyResults": null
  }
]

 ```

## Response Fields

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| waterStarRating | The NABERS Water star rating (0-6 stars) rounded to the nearest half star |
| waterStarRatingDecimal | The precise decimal value of the star rating before rounding |
| waterStarRatingGranular | The star rating to one decimal place |
| waterConsumption | Total water consumption considered in the rating (in kL) |
| recycledWaterPercent | Percentage of total water that is recycled water |
| predictedAverageWaterUse | The predicted average water use for a building of this type |
| normalisedWaterConsumption | Water consumption normalized for comparison purposes |
| noRecycle\* parameters | Equivalent ratings and metrics if no recycled water was used |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- Ensure all building characteristics are accurate as they directly impact the rating calculation
    
- The NABERS Water rating scale ranges from 0 to 6 stars, with 6 being the highest performance
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

request.description:
# Data Centre Infrastructure Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for Data Centre Infrastructure based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of data centres on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `****` (masked) | API subscription key (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control Object - Contains basic information about the building
    
2. RatingInputs Object - Contains building characteristics data and detailed energy consumption
    

### Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Yes | Australian postal code of the data center location |
| PremiseType | String | Yes | Type of premise, must be "DataCentre" for this endpoint |
| RatingScope | String | Yes | Scope of the rating, must be "Infrastructure" for this endpoint |
| RatingType | String | Yes | Type of rating, must be "Energy" for this endpoint |
| SiteName | String | Yes | Name of the data center site |
| EmailAddress | String | Yes | Contact email address for the assessment |
| CompanyName | String | Yes | Name of the company owning or operating the data center |
| BuildingAddress | String | Yes | Physical address of the data center |

### RatingInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Yes | Total onsite renewable electricity generation consumption in kWh |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Yes | Net onsite renewable electricity generation consumption in kWh |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Yes | Total onsite large-scale generation certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Yes | Total offsite renewable energy purchases in kWh |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Yes | Total electricity inclusions in kWh |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Yes | Total electricity exclusions in kWh |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Yes | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Yes | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Yes | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Yes | Total GreenPower purchased separately in kWh |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Yes | Offsite large-scale generation certificates surrendered |
| EnergyInputs | Object | Yes | Energy inputs for different sources |

### EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Yes | Electricity consumption in kWh |
| GreenPower | Number | Yes | GreenPower consumption percentage |
| Diesel | Number | Yes | Diesel consumption in L |
| HeatRejection | Number | Yes | Heat rejection rate |
| ITEnergy | Number | Yes | IT energy consumption in kWh/year |

## Expected Response

The response is a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

``` json
{
        "waterResults": null,
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": {
            "totalRenewableElectricity": 94089.21,
            "totalPredictedEmissions": null,
            "totalEnergyUse": 44358.0,
            "totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 417244.15,
            "totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 473915.93,
            "starRatingGranular": null,
            "starRatingDecimal": null,
            "starRating": null,
            "sectorComparisonDial": null,
            "rETAndStateTerritoryTargetsREIPercent": 1.4,
            "rETAndStateTerritoryTargets": 19876.24,
            "rEIResultPercentDecimal": 6.5,
            "rEIResultPercent": 7,
            "referenceData": null,
 ```

request.description:
# Data Centre IT Equipment Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for Data Centre IT equipment based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of data centres on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `****` (masked) | API subscription key (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as ProcessingCapacity, StorageCapacity, NoOfDays
        
    2. RenewableEnergy Indicator inputs such as totalOREGConsumption, totalOnsiteLGCsExported
        
    3. Energy inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The postcode of the premises location |
| PremiseType | String | Must be set to "DataCentre" for this rating type |
| RatingScope | String | Must be set to "ITEquipment" for data centre IT equipment ratings |
| RatingType | String | Must be set to "Energy" for energy ratings |
| SiteName | String | The name of the data centre |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | The company name |
| BuildingAddress | String | The full address of the data centre |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ProcessingCapacity | Number | Processing capacity of the IT equipment in kW |
| StorageCapacity | Number | Storage capacity in TB |
| NoOfDays | Numbers | Number of days in the rating period |

#### 2.2 Renewable Energy Indicator

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net on-site renewable electricity generation consumption |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total on-site large-scale generation certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total offsite renewable electricity purchases |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in MJ |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in MJ |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Offsite large-scale generation certificates surrendered |

#### 2.3 EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Electricity consumption in MJ |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower percentage (0-100) |
| HeatRejection | Number | Heat rejection energy in MJ |

## Expected Response

The response is a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

``` json
[
  {
    "waterResults": null,
    "sequence": 1,
    "requestId": null,
    "lstExceptions": null,
    "ieResults": null,
    "energyResults": {
      "totalRenewableElectricity": 95178.31,
      "totalPredictedEmissions": null,
      "totalEnergyUse": 2559901.2,
      "totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 416361.97,
      "totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 472913.95,
      "starRatingGranular": null,
      "starRatingDecimal": null,
      "starRating": null,
      "sectorComparisonDial": null,
      "rETAndStateTerritoryTargetsREIPercent": 1.5,
      "rETAndStateTerritoryTargets": 20965.34,
      "rEIResultPercentDecimal": 6.6,
      "rEIResultPercent": 7,
      "referenceData": null,
      "predictedMedianITEnergy": 449000.0,
      "predictedMedianInfrastructure": 244483.9,
      "predictedGreenhouseGasIntensity": 544954.748,
      "performanceIndicatorResult": null,
      "otherVoluntaryPurchasesREIPercent": 23.8,
      "otherVoluntaryPurchases": 343123.0,
      "onsiteRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 3.8,
      "onsiteRenewableElectricity": 54212.97,
      "nonRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 35.6,
      "nonRenewableElectricity": 513926.77,
      "noGreenPowerStarRatingGranular": 3.5,
      "noGreenPowerStarRatingDecimal": 3.54957354844443,
      "noGreenPowerStarRating": 3.5,
      "noGreenPowerPredictedGHGIntensity": null,
      "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope123": 497634.725,
      "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope12": null,
      "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope123": 497634.725,
      "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope12": 1363.0,
      "noGreenPowerBenchmarkingFactor": 0.9131670874074116,
      "greenPowerREIPercent": 4.0,
      "greenpowerPercentage": 25.0,
      "greenPower": 58027.92,
      "greenHouseGasIntensityScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 0.0,
      "greenHouseGasIntensityScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 0.0,
      "greenhouseGasIntensityScope123": 373251.375,
      "greenhouseGasIntensityScope12": null,
      "greenhouseGasEmissionsScope123": 373251.375,
      "greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12": 1023.0,
      "gasAndLPGREIPercent": 57.7,
      "energyIntensity": null,
      "emissionFactorElectricity": 0.7,
      "dieselREIPercent": 0.0,
      "calculatedPUE": 710762.0,
      "benchmarkingFactor": 300470.8,
      "actualEmissionsWoGP": null,
      "actualEmissions": null
    }
  }
]

 ```

## Response Fields

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| totalRenewableElectricity | Total renewable electricity in MJ |
| totalEnergyUse | Total energy use in MJ |
| starRating | NABERS star rating (0-6) |
| starRatingDecimal | Precise decimal value of the star rating |
| noGreenPowerStarRating | Star rating without GreenPower |
| greenPower | GreenPower consumption in MJ |
| greenpowerPercentage | GreenPower percentage used |
| calculatedPUE | Power Usage Effectiveness value |
| benchmarkingFactor | Factor used for benchmarking |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Energy Rating Calculator API specifications.

[https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs](https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs)
