request.description:
# Apartment Building Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for Apartment Building based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of Apartment Building on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control Object - Contains basic information about the building
    
2. RatingInputs Object - Contains building characteristics data and detailed energy consumption
    

### Control Object

| Field | Type | Description | Required | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Australian postcode of the building | Yes | "2150" |
| PremiseType | String | Type of premise | Yes | "apartmentbuilding" |
| RatingScope | String | Scope of the rating | No | "" |
| RatingType | String | Type of rating | Yes | "Energy" |
| SiteName | String | Name of the site | Yes | "4 Parramatta Square" |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address | Yes | "naberstest@environment.nsw.gov.au" |
| CompanyName | String | Company name | Yes | "DPE" |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the building | Yes | "12 Darcy street, Parramatta NSW - 2150" |

### RatingInputs Object

| Field | Type | Description | Required | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ParkingSpacesMechanical | Number | Number of mechanically ventilated parking spaces | Yes | 298 |
| ParkingSpacesNatural | Number | Number of naturally ventilated parking spaces | Yes | 0 |
| apartmentsForRating | Number | Number of apartments included in the rating | Yes | 150 |
| totalApartments | Number | Total number of apartments in the building | Yes | 150 |
| apartmentsWithCAC | Number | Number of apartments with central air conditioning | Yes | 150 |
| apartmentsWithCWS | Number | Number of apartments with central water systems | Yes | 0 |
| apartmentsWithLift | Number | Number of apartments with lift access | Yes | 150 |
| schemeHasHeatedPool | Boolean | Whether the building has a heated pool | Yes | true |
| monthsPoolAvailable | Number | Number of months the pool is available | Yes | 12 |
| schemeHasGym | Boolean | Whether the building has a gym | Yes | true |
| monthsGymAvailable | Number | Number of months the gym is available | Yes | 12 |
| hasSwimmingPool | Boolean | Whether the building has a swimming pool | Yes | true |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption | Yes | 54212.97 |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net on-site renewable electricity generation consumption | Yes | 54212.97 |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total on-site large-scale generation certificates exported | Yes | 10 |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total off-site energy purchases | Yes | 10000 |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in kWh | Yes | 1274457.25 |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in kWh | Yes | 719565.14 |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ | Yes | 2996857.54 |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ | Yes | 450.55 |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh | Yes | 55027.92 |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in kWh | Yes | 3000 |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Off-site large-scale generation certificates surrendered | Yes | 333.123 |
| EnergyInputs | Object | Energy consumption inputs | Yes | See example |

#### EnergyInputs Object

| Field | Type | Description | Required | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Electricity consumption in kWh | Yes | 659959.6 |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower consumption in kWh | Yes | 30 |
| Gas | Number | Gas consumption in MJ | Yes | 5000 |

## Expected Response

The response is a JSON object containing the calculated NABERS rating and related information:

``` json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Rating calculated successfully",
  "energyResults": {
    "starRating": 4.5,
    "ratingScore": 4.5,
    "ratingType": "Energy",
    "premiseType": "apartmentbuilding",
    "totalEmissions": 1250000,
    "emissionsIntensity": 125.5,
    "benchmarkEmissionsIntensity": 150.0,
    "totalEnergyConsumption": 4271314.79,
    "energyConsumptionPerApartment": 28475.43,
    "benchmarkEnergyConsumptionPerApartment": 35000.0,
    "electricityConsumption": 659959.6,
    "gasConsumption": 2996857.54,
    "dieselConsumption": 0,
    "coalConsumption": 0,
    "totalGreenPower": 55027.92,
    "totalGreenPowerPercentage": 8.34,
    "onSiteGeneration": 54212.97,
    "offSiteGreenPower": 3000,
    "offSiteLGCs": 333.123
  }
}

 ```

## Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| status | String | Status of the calculation (success/error) |
| message | String | Message describing the result or error |
| energyResults | Object | Contains the energy rating results |
| starRating | Number | The NABERS star rating (0-6) |
| ratingScore | Number | The numerical score of the rating |
| ratingType | String | The type of rating (Energy) |
| premiseType | String | The type of premise (apartmentbuilding) |
| totalEmissions | Number | Total greenhouse gas emissions (kg CO2-e) |
| emissionsIntensity | Number | Emissions intensity (kg CO2-e/m²) |
| benchmarkEmissionsIntensity | Number | Benchmark emissions intensity for comparison |
| totalEnergyConsumption | Number | Total energy consumption (MJ) |
| energyConsumptionPerApartment | Number | Energy consumption per apartment (MJ/apartment) |
| benchmarkEnergyConsumptionPerApartment | Number | Benchmark energy consumption per apartment |
| electricityConsumption | Number | Total electricity consumption (kWh) |
| gasConsumption | Number | Total gas consumption (MJ) |
| dieselConsumption | Number | Total diesel consumption (L) |
| coalConsumption | Number | Total coal consumption (kg) |
| totalGreenPower | Number | Total GreenPower purchased (kWh) |
| totalGreenPowerPercentage | Number | Percentage of electricity from GreenPower |
| onSiteGeneration | Number | On-site renewable energy generation (kWh) |
| offSiteGreenPower | Number | Off-site GreenPower purchases (kWh) |
| offSiteLGCs | Number | Off-site Large-scale Generation Certificates |

## Notes

- All energy consumption values should be provided for a 12-month rating period
    
- The API uses Australian standards for energy measurement units
    
- Star ratings are calculated based on the NABERS Energy for Apartment Buildings methodology
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Energy Rating Calculator API specifications.

[https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs](https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs)

# Apartment Building Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This endpoint calculates the NABERS water rating for an Apartment Building based on the provided water consumption data and building characteristics.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as ParkingSpacesMechanical, totalApartments, monthsPoolAvailable, etc
        
    2. Water inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Yes | Australian postcode of the building location |
| PremiseType | String | Yes | Type of premise (must be "apartmentbuilding") |
| RatingType | String | Yes | Type of rating (must be "Water") |
| SiteName | String | Yes | Name of the apartment building |
| EmailAddress | String | No | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | No | Name of the company managing the building |
| BuildingAddress | String | No | Physical address of the building |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| apartmentsForRating | Number | Yes | Number of apartments included in the rating |
| totalApartments | Number | Yes | Total number of apartments in the building |
| apartmentsWithCAC | Number | Yes | Number of apartments with central air conditioning |
| apartmentsWithCWS | Number | Yes | Number of apartments with central water systems |
| apartmentsWithCWM | Number | Yes | Number of apartments with central water metering |
| apartmentsWithCDHW | Number | Yes | Number of apartments with central domestic hot water |
| apartmentsWithWCDHW | Number | Yes | Number of apartments with water-cooled domestic hot water |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Yes | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| RecycledWater | Number | No | Total recycled water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |

## Expected Response

``` json
{
        "waterResults": {
            "waterStarRatingGranular": 3.8,
            "waterStarRatingDecimal": 3.8976907913263874,
            "waterStarRating": 3.5,
            "waterConsumptionPerUnitArea": 151.22,
            "waterConsumption": 22032.6,
            "recycledWaterPercent": 2.8673455892077766,
            "predictedAverageWaterUse": null,
            "normalisedWaterConsumption": 146.884,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 3.8,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": 3.8061109546606593,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRating": 3.5,
            "noRecycleWaterConsumption": 22683.0,
            "noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse": 1.1911111111111112,
            "noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption": 151.22,
            "noRecycleBenchmarkingFactor": null,
            "benchmarkingFactor": null
        },
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": null
    }

 ```

## Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| waterResults | Object | Contains all water rating results |
| waterStarRatingGranular | Number | Water star rating to one decimal place |
| waterStarRatingDecimal | Number | Precise decimal water star rating |
| waterStarRating | Number | Official water star rating (rounded to nearest 0.5) |
| waterConsumptionPerUnitArea | Number | Water consumption per unit area (L/m²) |
| waterConsumption | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| recycledWaterPercent | Number | Percentage of recycled water used |
| normalisedWaterConsumption | Number | Normalized water consumption accounting for building characteristics |
| noRecycleWaterStarRating | Number | Water star rating without recycled water consideration |
| noRecycleWaterConsumption | Number | Water consumption without recycled water consideration |
| noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse | Number | Predicted average water use without recycled water |
| noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption | Number | Normalized water consumption without recycled water |
| sequence | Number | Sequence number of the calculation |
| requestId | String | Unique identifier for the request (if provided) |
| lstExceptions | Array | List of exceptions or errors (if any) |
| ieResults | Object | Indoor environment results (null for water ratings) |
| energyResults | Object | Energy results (null for water ratings) |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

[https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs](https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs)

# Residential Aged Care Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for Residential Aged Care buildings based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of Residential Aged Care buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `{{vault:API_KEY}}` | API subscription key (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control Object - Contains basic information about the building
    
2. RatingInputs Object - Contains building characteristics data and detailed energy consumption
    

#### Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Yes | Australian postcode of the facility location |
| PremiseType | String | Yes | Type of premise (must be "RACRL") |
| RatingScope | String | Yes | Scope of the rating (must be "residential aged care") |
| RatingType | String | Yes | Type of rating (must be "Energy") |
| SiteName | String | Yes | Name of the residential aged care facility |
| EmailAddress | String | No | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | No | Name of the company managing the facility |
| BuildingAddress | String | No | Physical address of the facility |

#### RatingInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| occupiedBedDays | Number | Yes | Number of occupied bed days during the rating period |
| heavyLaundry | String | Yes | Whether heavy laundry is done on-site ("Yes" or "No") |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Yes | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption |

| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Yes | Offsite large-scale generation certificates surrendered |
| EnergyInputs | Object | Yes | Object containing energy consumption data |

#### EnergyInputs Object

exec: # RACRL Aged Care Water Rating Calculator

This POST request calculates NABERS water ratings for Residential Aged Care facilities based on provided building characteristics and water consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Water rating assesses the water efficiency of residential aged care buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |
The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:
Contains metadata about the building and rating request:
| Postcode | String | The postcode of the premises location |
| PremiseType | String | Must be set to "RACRL" for this rating type |
| RatingScope | String | Must be set to "residential aged care" for this rating type |
| RatingType | String | Must be set to "Water" for water ratings |
| SiteName | String | The name of the facility |
| BuildingAddress | String | The full address of the facility |
Contains the specific data required for calculating a residential aged care water rating:
| occupiedBedDays | Number | Total number of occupied bed days in the rating period |
| heavyLaundry | String | Whether the facility has heavy laundry service ("Yes" or "No") |
| WaterInputs | Object | Water consumption data (see below) |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
The API returns a JSON array containing a single object with the following structure:
| waterStarRating | The NABERS Water star rating (0-6 stars) rounded to the nearest half star |
| waterStarRatingDecimal | The precise decimal value of the star rating before rounding |
| waterStarRatingGranular | The star rating to one decimal place |
| waterConsumption | Total water consumption considered in the rating (in kL) |
| recycledWaterPercent | Percentage of total water that is recycled water |
| normalisedWaterConsumption | Water consumption normalized for comparison purposes |
| noRecycle\* parameters | Equivalent ratings and metrics if no recycled water was used |
| benchmarkingFactor | Factor used in the benchmarking calculation |
- The rating period is typically 12 months
- Ensure all building characteristics are accurate as they directly impact the rating calculation
- The NABERS Water rating scale ranges from 0 to 6 stars, with 6 being the highest performance
This documentation is based on the NABERS Energy Rating Calculator API specifications.
// RACRL Aged Care Water Rating Calculator
* @description This script provides documentation for the NABERS Residential Aged Care Water Rating Calculator API
* This POST request calculates NABERS water ratings for Residential Aged Care facilities based on provided building
* characteristics and water consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System)
* Water rating assesses the water efficiency of residential aged care buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars,
* The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:
*    - Postcode (String): The postcode of the premises location
*    - PremiseType (String): Must be set to "RACRL" for this rating type
*    - RatingScope (String): Must be set to "residential aged care" for this rating type
*    - RatingType (String): Must be set to "Water" for water ratings
*    - SiteName (String): The name of the facility
*    - BuildingAddress (String): The full address of the facility
*    - occupiedBedDays (Number): Total number of occupied bed days in the rating period
*    - heavyLaundry (String): Whether the facility has heavy laundry service ("Yes" or "No")
*      - Water (Number): Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL)
*      - RecycledWater (Number): Total recycled water consumption in kiloliters (kL)
* The API returns a JSON object containing:
* - waterResults: Contains the calculated water rating and related metrics
*   - waterStarRating: The final NABERS star rating (0-6)
*   - waterStarRatingDecimal: The precise decimal rating value
*   - recycledWaterPercent: Percentage of recycled water used
*   - benchmarkingFactor: Factor used in the rating calculation
* - All water consumption values should be provided in kiloliters (kL)
* - The rating period should typically be 12 months
* - Ratings are influenced by climate zone (determined by postcode)
* - The API automatically applies normalization factors based on location and building characteristics
* - A minimum of 6 months of data is required for a valid rating
// Add any test scripts below this line if needed

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS water ratings for Residential Aged Care buildings based on provided building characteristics and water consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the water efficiency of Residential Aged Care buildings on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method:** POST
    
- **URL:** `https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate`
    

## Headers

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | `{{vault:API_KEY}}` | API subscription key (required) |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as occupiedBedDays, heavyLaundry
        
    2. Water inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Australian postal code of the facility |
| PremiseType | String | Must be "RACRL" for Residential Aged Care facilities |
| RatingScope | String | Must be "residential aged care" |
| RatingType | String | Must be "Water" for water rating calculations |
| SiteName | String | Name of the facility |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | Name of the company managing the facility |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the facility |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| occupiedBedDays | Number | Total number of occupied bed days during the rating period |
| heavyLaundry | String | Whether heavy laundry is done on-site ("Yes" or "No") |
| WaterInputs | Object | Water consumption data |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water used in kiloliters (kL) |

## Example Response Body

``` json
[
  {
    "waterResults": {
      "waterStarRatingGranular": 1.6,
      "waterStarRatingDecimal": 1.6710467870891326,
      "waterStarRating": 1.5,
      "waterConsumptionPerUnitArea": null,
      "waterConsumption": 154.2,
      "recycledWaterPercent": 28.61111111111111,
      "predictedAverageWaterUse": null,
      "normalisedWaterConsumption": 0.514,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 0.0,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": -0.4650823215872067,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRating": 0.0,
      "noRecycleWaterConsumption": 216.0,
      "noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse": 0.3377,
      "noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption": 0.72,
      "noRecycleBenchmarkingFactor": 2.132069884512881,
      "benchmarkingFactor": 1.5220610008883624
    },
    "sequence": 1,
    "requestId": null,
    "lstExceptions": null,
    "ieResults": null,
    "energyResults": null
  }
]

 ```

## Response

The API returns a JSON array containing a single object with the calculation results.

## Response Object Details

### waterResults Object

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| waterStarRatingGranular | Number | The granular star rating (to 1 decimal place) |
| waterStarRatingDecimal | Number | The precise decimal star rating value |
| waterStarRating | Number | The official NABERS star rating (rounded to nearest 0.5) |
| waterConsumption | Number | Net water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| recycledWaterPercent | Number | Percentage of recycled water used |
| normalisedWaterConsumption | Number | Water consumption normalized by benchmarking factors |
| noRecycleWaterStarRating | Number | Star rating without recycled water consideration |
| noRecycleWaterConsumption | Number | Total water consumption without recycled water |
| benchmarkingFactor | Number | Factor used in the rating calculation |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- Ensure all building characteristics are accurate as they directly impact the rating calculation
    
- The NABERS Water rating scale ranges from 0 to 6 stars, with 6 being the highest performance
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

request.description:
# RACRL Retirement Living Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for Retirement Living facilities based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of Retirement Living facilities on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control Object - Contains basic information about the facility
    
2. RatingInputs Object - Contains facility characteristics data and detailed energy consumption
    

### Control Object

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Australian postcode of the facility |
| PremiseType | String | Type of premise |
| RatingScope | String | Scope of the rating |
| RatingType | String | Type of rating |
| SiteName | String | Name of the site |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | Company name |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the facility |
| ratingPeriodFrom | String | This optional field can be used if you want to calculate the rating based on a previous year emission data |

### RatingInputs Object

| Field | Type | Description | Required | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| siteArea | Number | Total site area in square meters | Yes | 5000 |
| totalNumberOfDwellings | Number | Total number of dwellings in the facility | Yes | 500 |
| numberOfServicedApartments | Number | Number of serviced apartments | Yes | 500 |
| heatedPoolArea | Number | Area of heated pool in square meters | Yes | 100 |
| unheatedPoolArea | Number | Area of unheated pool in square meters | Yes | 70 |
| weeklyMeals | Number | Number of meals served weekly | Yes | 150 |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total onsite renewable electricity generation consumption | Yes | 54212.97 |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net onsite renewable electricity generation consumption | Yes | 54212.97 |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total onsite Large-scale Generation Certificates exported | Yes | 10 |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total offsite energy purchases | Yes | 10000 |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in kWh | Yes | 1274457.25 |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in kWh | Yes | 719565.14 |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ | Yes | 2996857.54 |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ | Yes | 450.55 |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh | Yes | 55027.92 |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in kWh | Yes | 3000 |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Offsite Large-scale Generation Certificates surrendered | Yes | 333.123 |
| EnergyInputs | Object | Energy consumption details | Yes | See below |

### EnergyInputs Object

| Field | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Electricity consumption in kWh | 3088967 |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower percentage | 20 |
| Gas | Number | Gas consumption in MJ | 5000 |
| LPG | Number | LPG consuption in L | 30 |
| Diesel | Number | Diesel consuption in L | 30 |

## Expected Response

The API returns a JSON object with the following structure:

``` json
[
  {
    "waterResults": null,
    "sequence": 1,
    "requestId": null,
    "lstExceptions": null,
    "ieResults": null,
    "energyResults": {
      "totalRenewableElectricity": 94089.21,
      "totalPredictedEmissions": null,
      "totalEnergyUse": 11125281.2,
      "totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 417420.51,
      "totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 474137.75,
      "starRatingGranular": null,
      "starRatingDecimal": null,
      "starRating": null,
      "sectorComparisonDial": null,
      "rETAndStateTerritoryTargetsREIPercent": 1.4,

      "predictedGreenhouseGasIntensity": 2919.867744940536,
      "performanceIndicatorResult": null,
      "otherVoluntaryPurchasesREIPercent": 23.8,
      "otherVoluntaryPurchases": 343123.0,
      "onsiteRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 3.8,
      "onsiteRenewableElectricity": 54212.97,
      "nonRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 35.7,
      "nonRenewableElectricity": 515015.87,
      "noGreenPowerStarRatingGranular": 1.8,
      "noGreenPowerStarRatingDecimal": 1.8137836487030854,
      "noGreenPowerStarRating": 1.5,
      "noGreenPowerPredictedGHGIntensity": null,
      "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope123": 4325.2001,
      "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope12": 4077.9517400000004,
      "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope123": 2162600.05,
      "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope12": 2038975.87,
      "noGreenPowerBenchmarkingFactor": 1.4813000032260308,
      "greenPowerREIPercent": 4.0,
      "greenpowerPercentage": null,
      "greenPower": 58027.92,
      "greenHousGasEmissionLPG": null,
      "greenHousGasEmissionGas": null,
      "greenHousGasEmissionElectricity": null,
      "greenHousGasEmissionDiesel": null,
      "greenHousGasEmissionCoal": null,

      "actualEmissions": null
    }

]

 ```

### Response Fields

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| energyResults.starRating | The NABERS star rating (0-6 stars) |
| energyResults.starRatingDecimal | The precise decimal value of the star rating |
| energyResults.totalEnergyUse | Total energy consumption in MJ |
| energyResults.greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12 | Greenhouse gas emissions (Scope 1 & 2) in kg CO₂-e |
| energyResults.greenhouseGasEmissionsScope123 | Greenhouse gas emissions (Scope 1, 2 & 3) in kg CO₂-e |
| energyResults.energyIntensity | Energy intensity in MJ/m² |
| energyResults.benchmarkingFactor | Factor used in benchmarking calculations |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Energy Rating Calculator API specifications.

[https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs](https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs)

# RACRL Retirement Living Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS water ratings for Retirement Living facilities based on provided building characteristics and water consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of Retirement Living facilities on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as siteArea, totalNumberOfDwellings, weeklyMeals
        
    2. Water inputs used for the rating.
        

## 1 Control Object

| Field | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | string | Australian postcode of the retirement living facility location | "2150" |
| PremiseType | string | Type of premise (must be "racrl" for Retirement Living) | "racrl" |
| RatingScope | string | Scope of the rating | "retirement living" |
| RatingType | string | Type of rating (Energy or Water) | "Energy" |
| SiteName | string | Name of the site | "4 Parramatta Square" |
| EmailAddress | string | Contact email address | "naberstest@environment.nsw.gov.au" |
| CompanyName | string | Company name | "DPE" |
| BuildingAddress | string | Physical address of the building | "12 Darcy street, Parramatta NSW - 2150" |

---

## 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Field | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| siteArea | number | Total site area in square meters | 5000 |
| totalNumberOfDwellings | number | Total number of dwellings in the facility | 500 |
| heatedPoolArea | number | Area of heated pool in square meters (if applicable) | 100 |
| weeklyMeals | number | Number of meals served weekly | 150 |
| WaterInputs | object | Water consumption data | (see below) |

---

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Field | Type | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Water | number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) | 21683 |
| RecycledWater | number | Total recycled water usage in kiloliters (kL) | 650.4 |

---

## Expected Response

The API returns a JSON object with the following structure:

``` json
[
  {
    "waterResults": {
      "targetMaxWaterIntensity": "48",
      "targetMaxWaterConsumption": 18120,
      "targetMaxWaterBF": null,
      "primaryIntermediateOutputs": null,
      "predictedAveWater": 71475
    },
    "sequence": 1,
    "lstErrors": null,
    "energyResults": null
  }
]

 ```

---

## Response Fields

The API returns a JSON array with a single object containing the calculation results.

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| targetMaxWaterIntensity | string | Maximum water intensity target (L/m²/year) |
| targetMaxWaterConsumption | number | Maximum water consumption target (kL/year) |
| targetMaxWaterBF | null | Base figure for water target (if applicable) |
| primaryIntermediateOutputs | null | Intermediate calculation outputs (if available) |
| predictedAveWater | number | Predicted average water consumption (kL) |

---

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

request.description:
# RACRL Co-Located Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates NABERS energy ratings for RACRL co-located facilities based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) Energy rating assesses the energy efficiency of RACRL co-located facilities on a scale of 0 to 6 stars, with 6 stars representing market-leading performance.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control Object - Contains basic information about the facility
    
2. RatingInputs Object - Contains facility characteristics data and detailed energy consumption
    

### Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Yes | Australian postcode of the facility location |
| PremiseType | String | Yes | Must be "racrl" for Residential Aged Care and Retirement Living |
| RatingScope | String | Yes | Must be "co-located" for co-located facilities |
| RatingType | String | Yes | Must be "Energy" for energy rating calculations |
| SiteName | String | Yes | Name of the facility |
| EmailAddress | String | Yes | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | Yes | Name of the company operating the facility |
| BuildingAddress | String | Yes | Physical address of the facility |

### RatingInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| siteArea | Number | Yes | Total site area in square meters |
| occupiedBedDays | Number | Yes | Number of occupied bed days |
| totalNumberOfDwellings | Number | Yes | Total number of dwellings in the facility |
| numberOfServicedApartments | Number | Yes | Number of serviced apartments |
| heatedPoolArea | Number | No | Area of heated pools in square meters |
| unheatedPoolArea | Number | No | Area of unheated pools in square meters |
| heavyLaundry | String | Yes | "Yes" or "No" indicating if heavy laundry is done on-site |
| weeklyMeals | Number | Yes | Number of meals served weekly |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Yes | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption in kWh |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Yes | Net on-site renewable electricity generation consumption in kWh |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | No | Total on-site Large-scale Generation Certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | No | Total off-site energy purchases in kWh |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Yes | Total electricity inclusions in kWh |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Yes | Total electricity exclusions in kWh |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Yes | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Yes | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Yes | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | No | Total GreenPower purchased separately in kWh |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | No | Number of off-site Large-scale Generation Certificates surrendered |

### EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Total electricity consumption in kWh |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower percentage or amount |
| Gas | Number | Total gas consumption in MJ |
| LPG | Number | Total LPG consumption in L |
| Diesel | Number | Total Diesel consumption in L |

## Expected Response

The API returns a JSON object with the following structure:


request.description:
## NABERS Warehouse and Cold Stores Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates energy ratings and performance metrics for warehouse and cold store facilities based on provided building characteristics and energy consumption data. The calculator uses the NABERS (National Australian Built Environment Rating System) methodology to assess the energy efficiency of the facility.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control Object - Contains basic information about the facility
    
2. RatingInputs Object - Contains facility characteristics data and detailed energy consumption
    

#### Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | Australian postal code of the facility location |
| PremiseType | String | Type of premise (must be "warehouse and cold store") |
| RatingType | String | Type of rating to calculate (must be "Energy") |
| RatingScope | String | Scope of the rating (optional) |
| SiteName | String | Name of the site being rated |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email address |
| CompanyName | String | Name of the company owning/operating the facility |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the building |

#### RatingInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ratedSiteArea | Number | Total site area in square meters |
| conditionedGLA | Number | Conditioned gross lettable area in square meters |
| nonConditionedAmbientGLA | Number | Non-conditioned ambient gross lettable area in square meters |
| coolRoomVolume0To15Deg | Number | Volume of cool rooms between 0°C and 15°C in cubic meters |
| coolRoomVolumeMinus20To0Deg | Number | Volume of cool rooms between -20°C and 0°C in cubic meters |
| weeklyOperatingHours | Number | Weekly operating hours of the facility |
| numberOfFTEWorkers | Number | Number of full-time equivalent workers |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption in MJ |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net on-site renewable electricity generation consumption in MJ |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total on-site large-scale generation certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total off-site energy purchases in MJ |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in MJ |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in MJ |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Off-site large-scale generation certificates surrendered |
| EnergyInputs | Object | Breakdown of energy inputs by type |

##### EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Electricity consumption in MJ |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower percentage |
| Gas | Number | Gas consumption in MJ |
| LPG | Number | LPG consumption in L |
| Diesel | Number | Diesel consumption in L |

### Expected Response

The API returns a JSON object with the following structure:

``` json
[
  {
    "waterResults": null,
    "wasteResults": null,
    "sequence": 1,
    "requestId": null,
    "lstExceptions": null,
    "ieResults": null,
    "energyResults": {
      "totalRenewableElectricity": 94089.21,
      "totalEnergyUse": 2382012.56,
      "totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 417501.8,
      "totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 474239.08,
      "rETAndStateTerritoryTargetsREIPercent": 1.4,
      "rETAndStateTerritoryTargets": 19876.24,
      "rEIResultPercentDecimal": 6.5,
      "rEIResultPercent": 7,
      "otherVoluntaryPurchasesREIPercent": 23.8,
      "otherVoluntaryPurchases": 343123.0,
      "onsiteRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 3.8,
      "onsiteRenewableElectricity": 54212.97,
      "nonRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 35.7,
      "nonRenewableElectricity": 515015.87,
      "noGreenPowerStarRatingGranular": 5.4,
      "noGreenPowerStarRatingDecimal": 5.4338588654904525,
      "noGreenPowerStarRating": 5.0,
      "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope123": 7707.0,
      "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope12": 7265.0,
      "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope123": 462396.0,
      "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope12": 435912.0,
      "greenPowerREIPercent": 4.0,
      "greenpowerPercentage": 25.0,
      "greenPower": 58027.92,
      "greenHousGasEmissionLPG": 0.0,
      "greenHousGasEmissionGas": 323.0,
      "greenHousGasEmissionElectricity": 346479.0,
      "greenHousGasEmissionDiesel": 101.0,
      "greenHousGasEmissionCoal": 0.0,
      "greenHouseGasIntensityScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 6958.36,
      "greenHouseGasIntensityScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 7903.98,
      "greenhouseGasIntensityScope123": 5782.0,
      "greenhouseGasIntensityScope12": 5450.0,
      "greenhouseGasEmissionsScope123": 346903.0,
      "greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12": 327019.0,
      "gasAndLPGREIPercent": 57.7,
      "energyIntensity": 39700.20933333333,
      "dieselREIPercent": 0.0
    }
  }
]

 ```

### Response Fields

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| energyResults.noGreenPowerStarRating | The NABERS star rating without GreenPower (0-6 stars) |
| energyResults.noGreenPowerStarRatingDecimal | The precise decimal value of the star rating without GreenPower |
| energyResults.noGreenPowerStarRatingGranular | The granular star rating value without GreenPower |
| energyResults.totalEnergyUse | Total energy consumption in MJ |
| energyResults.energyIntensity | Energy intensity in MJ/m² |
| energyResults.greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12 | Greenhouse gas emissions (Scope 1 & 2) in kg CO₂-e |
| energyResults.greenhouseGasEmissionsScope123 | Greenhouse gas emissions (Scope 1, 2 & 3) in kg CO₂-e |
| energyResults.greenhouseGasIntensityScope12 | Greenhouse gas intensity (Scope 1 & 2) in kg CO₂-e/m² |
| energyResults.greenhouseGasIntensityScope123 | Greenhouse gas intensity (Scope 1, 2 & 3) in kg CO₂-e/m² |
| energyResults.totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity | Total emissions (Scope 1 & 2) with renewable electricity in kg CO₂-e |
| energyResults.totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity | Total emissions (Scope 1, 2 & 3) with renewable electricity in kg CO₂-e |
| energyResults.greenPower | GreenPower consumption in MJ |
| energyResults.greenpowerPercentage | Percentage of GreenPower used |
| energyResults.onsiteRenewableElectricity | On-site renewable electricity generation in MJ |
| energyResults.nonRenewableElectricity | Non-renewable electricity consumption in MJ |
| energyResults.benchmarkingFactor | Factor used in benchmarking calculations |
| energyResults.rEIResultPercent | Renewable Energy Index result percentage |
| energyResults.rEIResultPercentDecimal | Precise decimal value of the Renewable Energy Index result percentage |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Energy Rating Calculator API specifications.

[https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs](https://nabers.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/nabersapi/pages/169443329/NABERS+APIs)

request.description:
## NABERS School Governemnt Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates the NABERS Energy rating for a School (Government subsector) based on the provided parameters. The calculation takes into account various factors such as gross floor area, student numbers, energy consumption data, and renewable energy information.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control Object - Contains basic information about the facility
    
2. RatingInputs Object - Contains facility characteristics data and detailed energy consumption
    

### Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The Australian postcode where the school is located |
| PremiseType | String | Must be "School" for this endpoint |
| RatingScope | String | Leave empty for standard rating |
| RatingType | String | Must be "Energy" for energy rating calculation |
| subsector | String | Must be "government" for government schools |
| SiteName | String | Name of the school |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email for the rating |
| CompanyName | String | Organization name |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the school |

### RatingInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| schemeHasHeatedPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a heated pool |
| subsector | String | School subsector, must be "government" for government schools |
| remoteArea | String | Location classification (e.g., "Major Cities") |
| grossFloorArea | Number | Total floor area in square meters |
| numberOfELCStudents | Number | Number of early learning center students |
| numberOfPrimaryStudents | Number | Number of primary school students |
| numberOfSecondaryStudents | Number | Number of secondary school students |
| numberOfSpecialNeedsStudents | Number | Number of special needs students |
| hasSwimmingPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a swimming pool |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total onsite renewable electricity generation in kWh |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net onsite renewable electricity generation in kWh |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total onsite large-scale generation certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total offsite energy purchases |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in kWh |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in kWh |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in kWh |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Offsite large-scale generation certificates surrendered |

#### EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Electricity consumption in kWh |
| GreenPower | Number | GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| Gas | Number | Gas and LPG consumption in MJ |
| Diesel | Number | Diesel consumption in L |

## Request Response

The API returns a JSON object with the following structure:

``` json
{
        "waterResults": null,
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": {
 ```

| predictedMedianITEnergy | Null | Predicted median IT energy |
| predictedMedianInfrastructure | Null | Predicted median infrastructure |

| noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope123 | Number | GHG emissions (Scope 1, 2 & 3) without GreenPower |

| greenHouseGasIntensityScope123WithRenewableElectricity | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity (Scope 1, 2 & 3) with renewable electricity |
| greenhouseGasIntensityScope123 | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity (Scope 1, 2 & 3) |
| greenhouseGasIntensityScope12 | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity (Scope 1 & 2) |

| greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12 | Number | Greenhouse gas emissions (Scope 1 & 2) |

## Notes

- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication

request.description:
## NABERS School Government Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates the NABERS Water rating for a School (Government subsector) based on the provided parameters. The calculation takes into account various factors such as site area, student numbers, water consumption data, and recycled water information.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as remoteArea, siteArea, numberOfPrimaryStudents
        
    2. Water inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The Australian postcode where the school is located |
| PremiseType | String | Must be "School" for this endpoint |
| RatingScope | String | Leave empty for standard rating |
| RatingType | String | Must be "Water" for water rating calculation |
| subsector | String | Must be "government" for government schools |
| SiteName | String | Name of the school |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email for the rating |
| CompanyName | String | Organization name |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the school |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| numberOfFTEWorkers | Number | Number of full-time equivalent workers |
| schemeHasHeatedPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a heated pool |
| siteArea | Number | Total site area in square meters |
| subsector | String | School subsector, must be "government" for government schools |
| remoteArea | String | Location classification (e.g., "Major Cities", "Inner Regional", "Outer Regional", "Remote", "Very Remote") |
| numberOfELCStudents | Number | Number of early learning center students |
| numberOfPrimaryStudents | Number | Number of primary school students |
| numberOfSecondaryStudents | Number | Number of secondary school students |
| numberOfSpecialNeedsStudents | Number | Number of special needs students |
| hasSwimmingPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a swimming pool |
| swimmingPoolArea | Number | Area of the swimming pool in square meters (if applicable) |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water usage in kiloliters (kL) |

## Request Response

The API returns a JSON object with the following structure:

``` json
{
        "waterResults": {
            "waterStarRatingGranular": 5.4,
            "waterStarRatingDecimal": 5.4488677180089,
            "waterStarRating": 5.0,
            "waterConsumptionPerUnitArea": null,
            "waterConsumption": 2203.2,
            "recycledWaterPercent": 2.857142857142857,
            "predictedAverageWaterUse": 5.273694651820107,
            "normalisedWaterConsumption": 2.181386138613861,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 5.4,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": 5.40324618030328,
 ```

request.description:
## NABERS School Independent Energy Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates the NABERS Energy rating for a School (Independent school subsector) based on the provided parameters. The calculation takes into account various factors such as gross floor area, student numbers, energy consumption data, and renewable energy information.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as remoteArea, grossFloorArea, numberOfPrimaryStudents
        
    2. RenewableEnergy Indicator inputs such as totalOREGConsumption, totalOnsiteLGCsExported
        
    3. Energy inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The Australian postcode where the school is located |
| PremiseType | String | Must be "School" for this endpoint |
| RatingScope | String | Leave empty for standard rating |
| RatingType | String | Must be "Energy" for energy rating calculation |
| subsector | String | Must be "independent school" for independent schools |
| SiteName | String | Name of the school |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email for the rating |
| CompanyName | String | Organization name |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the school |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| schemeHasHeatedPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a heated pool |
| subsector | String | School subsector, must be "independent school" for independent schools |
| remoteArea | String | Location classification (e.g., "Major Cities", "Inner Regional", "Outer Regional", "Remote", "Very Remote") |
| grossFloorArea | Number | Total gross floor area in square meters |
| numberOfELCStudents | Number | Number of early learning center students |
| numberOfPrimaryStudents | Number | Number of primary school students |
| numberOfSecondaryStudents | Number | Number of secondary school students |
| numberOfSpecialNeedsStudents | Number | Number of special needs students |
| hasSwimmingPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a swimming pool |

#### 2.2 Renewable Energy Indicator

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| totalOREGConsumption | Number | Total on-site renewable electricity generation consumption in kWh |
| netOREGConsumption | Number | Net on-site renewable electricity generation consumption in kWh |
| totalOnsiteLGCsExported | Number | Total on-site large-scale generation certificates exported |
| totalOffsitePurchases | Number | Total off-site energy purchases in kWh |
| totalElectricityInclusions | Number | Total electricity inclusions in kWh |
| totalElectricityExclusions | Number | Total electricity exclusions in kWh |
| totalGasAndLPGInclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG inclusions in MJ |
| totalGasAndLPGExclusions | Number | Total gas and LPG exclusions in MJ |
| totalGreenPowerConsumption | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| totalGreenPowerPurchasedSeperately | Number | Total GreenPower purchased separately in kWh |
| offsiteLGCsSurrendered | Number | Off-site large-scale generation certificates surrendered |

#### 2.3 EnergyInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Electricity | Number | Total electricity consumption in kWh |
| GreenPower | Number | Total GreenPower consumption in kWh |
| Gas | Number | Total gas and LPG consumption in MJ |
| Diesel | Number | Diesel consumption in L |

## Request Response

The API returns a JSON object with the following structure:

``` json
[{
  "waterResults": null,
  "sequence": 1,
  "requestId": null,
  "lstExceptions": null,
  "ieResults": null,
  "energyResults": {
    "totalRenewableElectricity": 93816.93,
    "totalPredictedEmissions": null,
    "totalEnergyUse": 2563743.2,
    "totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 417641.05,
    "totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity": 474388.25,
    "starRatingGranular": null,
    "starRatingDecimal": null,
    "starRating": null,
    "sectorComparisonDial": null,
    "rETAndStateTerritoryTargetsREIPercent": 1.4,
    "rETAndStateTerritoryTargets": 19603.96,
    "rEIResultPercentDecimal": 6.5,
    "rEIResultPercent": 7,
    "referenceData": null,
    "predictedMedianITEnergy": null,
    "predictedMedianInfrastructure": null,
    "predictedGreenhouseGasIntensity": 0.009901888006435152,
    "performanceIndicatorResult": null,
    "otherVoluntaryPurchasesREIPercent": 23.8,
    "otherVoluntaryPurchases": 343123.0,
    "onsiteRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 3.8,
    "onsiteRenewableElectricity": 54212.97,
    "nonRenewableElectricityREIPercent": 35.7,
    "nonRenewableElectricity": 515288.15,
    "noGreenPowerStarRatingGranular": 0.0,
    "noGreenPowerStarRatingDecimal": -0.5418427729607825,
    "noGreenPowerStarRating": 0.0,
    "noGreenPowerPredictedGHGIntensity": 0.009901888006435152,
    "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope123": 99.57131,
    "noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope12": 93.87211400000001,
    "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope123": 497856.55,
    "noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope12": 469360.57000000007,
    "noGreenPowerBenchmarkingFactor": 2.011158072789542,
    "greenPowerREIPercent": 4.0,
    "greenpowerPercentage": null,
    "greenPower": 58027.92,
    "greenHousGasEmissionLPG": null,
    "greenHousGasEmissionGas": null,
    "greenHousGasEmissionElectricity": null,
    "greenHousGasEmissionDiesel": null,
    "greenHousGasEmissionCoal": null,
    "greenHouseGasIntensityScope12WithRenewableElectricity": 83.53,

    "greenhouseGasIntensityScope12": 46.961822000000005,
    "greenhouseGasEmissionsScope123": 249089.84999999998,
    "greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12": 234809.11000000002,
    "gasAndLPGREIPercent": 57.7,
    "energyIntensity": 512.74864,
    "emissionFactorElectricity": null,
    "dieselREIPercent": 0.0,
    "calculatedPUE": null,
    "benchmarkingFactor": 1.0062317402019438,
    "actualEmissionsWoGP": null,
    "actualEmissions": null
  }
}]

 ```

### Response Fields

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| totalRenewableElectricity | Number | Total renewable electricity in kWh |
| totalEnergyUse | Number | Total energy use in MJ |
| totalEmissionsScope12WithRenewableElectricity | Number | Total emissions for Scope 1 and 2 with renewable electricity in kg CO₂-e |
| totalEmissionsScope123WithRenewableElectricity | Number | Total emissions for Scope 1, 2, and 3 with renewable electricity in kg CO₂-e |
| rETAndStateTerritoryTargetsREIPercent | Number | Renewable energy index percentage for RET and state/territory targets |
| rETAndStateTerritoryTargets | Number | Renewable energy targets in kWh |
| rEIResultPercentDecimal | Number | Renewable energy index result percentage with decimal precision |
| rEIResultPercent | Number | Rounded renewable energy index result percentage |
| predictedGreenhouseGasIntensity | Number | Predicted greenhouse gas intensity in kg CO₂-e/MJ |
| otherVoluntaryPurchasesREIPercent | Number | Renewable energy index percentage for other voluntary purchases |
| otherVoluntaryPurchases | Number | Other voluntary purchases in kWh |
| onsiteRenewableElectricityREIPercent | Number | Renewable energy index percentage for on-site renewable electricity |
| onsiteRenewableElectricity | Number | On-site renewable electricity in kWh |
| nonRenewableElectricityREIPercent | Number | Renewable energy index percentage for non-renewable electricity |
| nonRenewableElectricity | Number | Non-renewable electricity in kWh |
| noGreenPowerStarRatingGranular | Number | Detailed star rating without GreenPower |
| noGreenPowerStarRatingDecimal | Number | Star rating without GreenPower with decimal precision |
| noGreenPowerStarRating | Number | Final rounded star rating without GreenPower (0-6) |
| noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope123 | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity for Scope 1, 2, and 3 without GreenPower |
| noGreenPowerGHGIntensityScope12 | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity for Scope 1 and 2 without GreenPower |
| noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope123 | Number | Greenhouse gas emissions for Scope 1, 2, and 3 without GreenPower in kg CO₂-e |
| noGreenPowerGHGEmissionsScope12 | Number | Greenhouse gas emissions for Scope 1 and 2 without GreenPower in kg CO₂-e |
| noGreenPowerBenchmarkingFactor | Number | Benchmarking factor without GreenPower |
| greenPowerREIPercent | Number | Renewable energy index percentage for GreenPower |
| greenPower | Number | GreenPower in kWh |
| greenHouseGasIntensityScope12WithRenewableElectricity | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity for Scope 1 and 2 with renewable electricity |
| greenHouseGasIntensityScope123WithRenewableElectricity | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity for Scope 1, 2, and 3 with renewable electricity |
| greenhouseGasIntensityScope123 | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity for Scope 1, 2, and 3 |
| greenhouseGasIntensityScope12 | Number | Greenhouse gas intensity for Scope 1 and 2 |
| greenhouseGasEmissionsScope123 | Number | Greenhouse gas emissions for Scope 1, 2, and 3 in kg CO₂-e |
| greenhouseGasEmissionsScope12 | Number | Greenhouse gas emissions for Scope 1 and 2 in kg CO₂-e |
| gasAndLPGREIPercent | Number | Renewable energy index percentage for gas and LPG |
| energyIntensity | Number | Energy intensity in MJ/m² |
| benchmarkingFactor | Number | Factor used in benchmarking calculations |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

## NABERS School Independent Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates the NABERS Water rating for a School (Independent school subsector) based on the provided parameters. The calculation takes into account various factors such as site area, student numbers, water consumption data, and recycled water information.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as remoteArea, grossFloorArea, numberOfPrimaryStudents
        
    2. Water inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The Australian postcode where the school is located |
| PremiseType | String | Must be "School" for this endpoint |
| RatingScope | String | Leave empty for standard rating |
| RatingType | String | Must be "Water" for water rating calculation |
| subsector | String | Must be "independent school" for independent schools |
| SiteName | String | Name of the school |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email for the rating |
| CompanyName | String | Organization name |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the school |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| numberOfFTEWorkers | Number | Number of full-time equivalent workers |
| schemeHasHeatedPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a heated pool |
| siteArea | Number | Total site area in square meters |
| subsector | String | Must be "independent school" for independent schools |
| remoteArea | String | Location classification (e.g., "Major Cities") |
| numberOfELCStudents | Number | Number of early learning center students |
| numberOfPrimaryStudents | Number | Number of primary school students |
| numberOfSecondaryStudents | Number | Number of secondary school students |
| numberOfSpecialNeedsStudents | Number | Number of special needs students |
| hasSwimmingPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a swimming pool |
| swimmingPoolArea | Number | Area of the swimming pool in square meters |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water usage in kiloliters (kL) |

## Expected Response

The API returns a JSON object containing the water rating results:

``` json
[
  {
    "waterResults": {
      "waterStarRatingGranular": 5.3,
      "waterStarRatingDecimal": 5.35224404493008,
      "waterStarRating": 5.0,
      "waterConsumptionPerUnitArea": null,
      "waterConsumption": 4454.4,
      "recycledWaterPercent": 20.000000000000004,
      "predictedAverageWaterUse": 10.037053005634167,
      "normalisedWaterConsumption": 4.41029702970297,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 4.9,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": 4.9403050561626,
      "noRecycleWaterStarRating": 4.5,
      "noRecycleWaterConsumption": 5568.0,
      "noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse": 10.037053005634167,
      "noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption": 5.512871287128712,
      "noRecycleBenchmarkingFactor": 0.5492519850233067,
      "benchmarkingFactor": 0.4394015880186453
    },
    "sequence": 1,
    "requestId": null,
    "lstExceptions": null,
    "ieResults": null,
    "energyResults": null
  }
]

 ```

### Response Fields

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| waterStarRating | The final NABERS Water star rating (0-6 stars) |
| waterStarRatingDecimal | The precise decimal value of the star rating |
| waterStarRatingGranular | The rounded star rating to the nearest 0.5 |
| waterConsumption | The adjusted water consumption after recycled water credits |
| recycledWaterPercent | Percentage of total water that is recycled |
| normalisedWaterConsumption | Water consumption normalized by benchmarking factors |
| benchmarkingFactor | Factor used to normalize the water consumption |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.

request.description:
## NABERS School Catholic Water Rating Calculator

## Overview

This POST request calculates the NABERS Water rating for a School (Catholic systemic school subsector) based on the provided parameters. The calculation takes into account various factors such as site area, student numbers, water consumption data, and recycled water information.

## Request Method and URL

- **Method**: POST
    
- **URL**: [https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate](https://data.nabers.gov.au/ratingcalculator/calculate)
    

## Headers

| Header | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key required for authentication |

## Required Headers

| Header Name | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key | {{vault:API_KEY}} | API subscription key for authentication |

## Request Body

The request body is a JSON object containing two main sections:

1. Control contains basic information about the building such as postcode, building type, scope etc.
    
2. RatingInputs contains the following:
    
    1. Building attributes such as remoteArea, grossFloorArea, numberOfPrimaryStudents
        
    2. Water inputs used for the rating.
        

### 1 Control Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Postcode | String | The Australian postcode where the school is located |
| PremiseType | String | Must be "School" for this endpoint |
| RatingScope | String | Leave empty for standard rating |
| RatingType | String | Must be "Water" for water rating calculation |
| subsector | String | Must be "catholic systemic school" for catholic schools |
| SiteName | String | Name of the school |
| EmailAddress | String | Contact email for the rating |
| CompanyName | String | Organization name |
| BuildingAddress | String | Physical address of the school |

### 2 RatingInputs Object

#### 2.1 Attributes

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| numberOfFTEWorkers | Number | Number of full-time equivalent workers |
| schemeHasHeatedPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a heated pool |
| siteArea | Number | Total site area in square meters |
| subsector | String | School subsector, must be "catholic systemic school" for catholic schools |
| remoteArea | String | Location classification (e.g., "Major Cities", "Inner Regional", "Outer Regional", "Remote", "Very Remote") |
| numberOfELCStudents | Number | Number of early learning center students |
| numberOfPrimaryStudents | Number | Number of primary school students |
| numberOfSecondaryStudents | Number | Number of secondary school students |
| numberOfSpecialNeedsStudents | Number | Number of special needs students |
| hasSwimmingPool | Boolean | Whether the school has a swimming pool |
| swimmingPoolArea | Number | Area of the swimming pool in square meters (if applicable) |

#### 2.2 WaterInputs Object

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Water | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| RecycledWater | Number | Total recycled water usage in kiloliters (kL) |

## Request Response

The API returns a JSON object with the following structure:

``` json
[
    {
        "waterResults": {
            "waterStarRatingGranular": 3.4,
            "waterStarRatingDecimal": 3.4719344174320095,
            "waterStarRating": 3.0,
            "waterConsumptionPerUnitArea": null,
            "waterConsumption": 5011.2,
            "recycledWaterPercent": 10.000000000000002,
            "predictedAverageWaterUse": 5.273694651820107,
            "normalisedWaterConsumption": 4.9615841584158416,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular": 3.0,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal": 3.07992713048001,
            "noRecycleWaterStarRating": 3.0,
            "noRecycleWaterConsumption": 5568.0,
            "noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse": 5.273694651820107,
            "noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption": 5.512871287128712,
            "noRecycleBenchmarkingFactor": 1.0453527652053307,
            "benchmarkingFactor": 0.9408174886847975
        },
        "sequence": 1,
        "requestId": null,
        "lstExceptions": null,
        "ieResults": null,
        "energyResults": null
    }
]

 ```

### Response Fields

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| waterStarRatingGranular | Number | Detailed water star rating with decimal precision |
| waterStarRatingDecimal | Number | Water star rating with decimal precision |
| waterStarRating | Number | Final rounded water star rating (0-6) |
| waterConsumption | Number | Total water consumption in kiloliters (kL) |
| recycledWaterPercent | Number | Percentage of recycled water used |
| predictedAverageWaterUse | Number | Predicted average water use based on building characteristics |
| normalisedWaterConsumption | Number | Normalized water consumption metric |
| benchmarkingFactor | Number | Factor used in benchmarking calculations |
| noRecycleWaterStarRatingGranular | Number | Detailed water star rating without recycled water |
| noRecycleWaterStarRatingDecimal | Number | Water star rating without recycled water with decimal precision |
| noRecycleWaterStarRating | Number | Final rounded water star rating without recycled water (0-6) |
| noRecycleWaterConsumption | Number | Total water consumption without recycled water in kiloliters (kL) |
| noRecyclePredictedAverageWaterUse | Number | Predicted average water use without recycled water |
| noRecycleNormalisedWaterConsumption | Number | Normalized water consumption metric without recycled water |
| noRecycleBenchmarkingFactor | Number | Benchmarking factor without recycled water |

## Notes

- The rating period is typically 12 months
    
- The API requires a valid subscription key for authentication
    
- Different building types may require different input parameters
    

## References

This documentation is based on the NABERS Water Rating Calculator API specifications.
